title: taraxacum iranicum
intro: Taraxacum iranicum, also known as Iranian dandelion, is a plant species within the dandelion genus. It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine, where it is used to treat various ailments due to its diuretic and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Taraxacum iranicum include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce blood pressure, and act as an antioxidant. Herbal preparations of the plant may be consumed as teas, infusions, or extracts, although further research is necessary to confirm its effectiveness and potential side effects.
